## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Codex entry / lore
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] No `.env` or secrets committed
- [ ] Changeset added (`npm run changeset`) — skip for docs-only changes
- [ ] If adding a Codex entry: follows schema in `packages/shared/src/codex/`
